nasb.text: The sword is outside and the plague and the famine are within. He who is in the field will die by the sword; famine and the plague will also consume those in the city.

esv.text: The sword is without; pestilence and famine are within. He who is in the field dies by the sword, and him who is in the city famine and pestilence devour.

cnv.text: 城外有刀劍，城內有瘟疫和饑荒； 在田野的必死在刀下，在城裡的必被饑荒和瘟疫吞滅。

ccb.text: 城外有战祸，城内有饥荒瘟疫；城外的必丧身刀下，城内的必死于饥荒瘟疫。
